required_skills: Deep domain expertise and demonstrable mastery of a specific subject area or professional discipline
Content validation and accuracy review of educational materials, assessments, and learning resources
Curriculum consultation — advising instructional designers and content teams on scope, sequence, and depth of subject coverage
Assessment item writing including multiple-choice questions (MCQs), scenario-based items, and competency-based evaluation criteria
Clear and precise communication of complex technical or domain concepts to non-specialist audiences
Storyboard and script review for e-learning modules, video lectures, and multimedia content
Learning outcome alignment — mapping content to defined competency frameworks, industry standards, or exam blueprints
Collaboration with instructional designers, curriculum developers, and production teams in an agile content development environment
preferred_skills: Prior experience as an SME for a credentialing body, EdTech platform, publisher, or professional training organization
Familiarity with competency frameworks such as NQAF, NQF, CEFR, or industry-specific certification standards (CFA, CPA, PMP, SHRM)
Experience developing content for adaptive learning systems or personalized learning pathways
Understanding of item response theory (IRT) and psychometric principles for high-stakes assessment development
Comfort with rapid content review cycles and providing structured feedback under tight editorial timelines
Experience contributing to textbooks, course guides, or professional certification study materials
Knowledge of accessibility standards for educational content (WCAG 2.1, Section 508)
responsibilities: Serve as the authoritative domain expert for assigned subject areas, validating the accuracy, currency, and completeness of all educational content before publication or deployment
Develop high-quality assessment items — including MCQs, case scenarios, short-answer questions, and competency rubrics — mapped to defined learning outcomes and difficulty levels
Collaborate with instructional designers and curriculum developers to define course scope, content sequencing, and appropriate depth of coverage for the target learner audience
Review and provide structured editorial feedback on scripts, storyboards, slide decks, and e-learning module drafts to ensure subject matter accuracy and pedagogical soundness
Align content and assessments to relevant professional competency frameworks, certification exam blueprints, or regulatory standards applicable to the discipline
Participate in content sprint reviews and agile development cycles, delivering timely SME feedback within agreed editorial turnaround windows
Recommend real-world case studies, industry data, applied examples, and contemporary references that enhance the practical relevance of educational content
Contribute to question bank development and psychometric validation processes for high-stakes assessments, supporting item analysis and difficulty calibration
Stay current with developments in the domain by monitoring industry publications, regulatory updates, and academic research, proactively flagging content that requires revision
Support the training and quality briefing of junior content writers or associate SMEs joining a project, ensuring consistent standards of subject accuracy across the team
